mapper.sql: id, strategy_id, run_id, total_return, annual_return, sharpe_ratio, max_drawdown, alpha, beta, win_rate, volatility, total_trade_count, raw_json, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_quant_strategy_metric (id, strategy_id, run_id, total_return, annual_return, sharpe_ratio, max_drawdown, alpha, beta, win_rate, volatility, total_trade_count, raw_json, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{strategyId}, #{runId}, #{totalReturn}, #{annualReturn}, #{sharpeRatio}, #{maxDrawdown}, #{alpha}, #{beta}, #{winRate}, #{volatility}, #{totalTradeCount}, #{rawJson}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_quant_strategy_metric WHERE strategy_id = #{strategyId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_quant_strategy_metric WHERE strategy_id = #{strategyId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
